signature: pub enum Result<T, E> { Ok(T), Err(E) }
description: A type for returning and propagating errors. Ok represents success, Err represents failure. Python equivalent: try/except, but as a return type.

methods.name: unwrap
methods.description: Returns the Ok value. Panics on Err.

methods.name: map
methods.signature: fn map<U>(self, f: FnOnce(T) -> U) -> Result<U, E>
methods.description: Maps a Result<T, E> to Result<U, E>.
methods.example:
let x: Result<i32, &str> = Ok(5);
let y = x.map(|v| v * 2); // Ok(10)

methods.name: map_err
methods.signature: fn map_err<F>(self, f: FnOnce(E) -> F) -> Result<T, F>
methods.example:
let x: Result<i32, i32> = Err(1);
let y = x.map_err(|e| e + 1); // Err(2)

methods.name: unwrap_or
methods.description: Returns Ok value or a default.
